gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/70)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/70)
text: السِّوَاكِ قَالَ لَا تَدَعْهُ فِي كُلِّ ثَلَاثٍ وَ لَوْ أَنْ تُمِرَّهُ مَرَّةً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Bukeyr, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws regarding brushing of the teeth having said: ‘Do not neglect it during every three (Salaats) even if you pass it over the teeth, once’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ibn Bukayr from those whom he has mentioned has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not neglect brushing after every third (Salah (prayer)) even though it is a light one (brushing).”’
